wikitext:
{{Sequel Disambiguation}} {{Keyword Infobox|Block|2}}
{{KW|Block||2}} is the amount of damage a character or enemy can take before they lose HP.

By default, {{KW|Block||2}} is removed at the start of each turn.

{{BD|Dexterity||2}} and {{BD|Frail||2}} modify the amount of {{KW|Block||2}} you gain from cards, however it does not apply to cards that depend on other effects to generate {{KW|Block||2}} such as {{C|Rage||2}} or {{C|Afterimage||2}} nor does it apply to {{2|Relics}}.

{{KW|Block||2}} is capped at a value of 999,999,999 (1 less than a billion).

==== Relics ====
* {{R|Anchor||2}} - Start each combat with 10 {{KW|Block||2}}.
* {{R|Permafrost||2}} - The first time you play a {{QueryLink|Cards|type:Power|Power}} each combat, gain 6 {{KW|Block||2}}.
* {{R|Bone Flute||2}} - Whenever {{2|Osty}} attacks, gain 2 {{KW|Block||2}}.
** See [[StS2:Osty#Osty_Attacks|Osty > Osty Attacks]] for every way to trigger '''Bone Flute'''.
* {{R|Horn Cleat||2}} - At the start of your 2nd turn, gain 14 {{KW|Block||2}}.
* {{R|Orichalcum||2}} - If you end your turn without {{KW|Block||2}}, gain 6 {{KW|Block||2}}.
* {{R|Ornamental Fan||2}}) - Every time you play 3 {{QueryLink|Cards|type:Attack|Attacks}} in a single turn, gain 4 {{KW|Block||2}}.
* {{R|Ripple Basin||2}} - If you did not play any {{QueryLink|Cards|type:Attack|Attacks}} during your turn, gain 4 {{KW|Block||2}}.
* {{R|Tuning Fork||2}} - Every time you play 10 {{QueryLink|Cards|type:Skill|Skills}}, gain 7 {{KW|Block||2}}.
* {{R|Vambrace||2}} - The first time you gain {{KW|Block||2}} from a card each combat, double the amount gained.
* {{R|Self-Forming Clay||2}} - Whenever you lose HP in combat, gain 3 {{BD|Block Next Turn|Block|2}} next turn.
* {{R|Galactic Dust||2}} - For every 10 {{Icon|ST|2}} spent, gain 10 {{KW|Block||2}}.
* {{R|Regalite||2}} - Whenever you create a {{QueryLink|Cards|color:Colorless|2}} card, gain 2 {{KW|Block||2}}.
* {{R|Captain's Wheel||2}} - At the start of your 3rd turn, gain 18 {{KW|Block||2}}.
* {{R|Cloak Clasp||2}} - At the end of your turn, gain 1 {{KW|Block||2}} for each card in your Hand.
* {{R|Intimidating Helmet||2}} - Whenever you play a card that costs {{Icon|CE|2}}{{Icon|CE|2}} or more, gain 4 {{KW|Block||2}}.
* {{R|Tough Bandages||2}} - Whenever you discard a card during your turn, gain 3 {{KW|Block||2}}.
* {{R|Pael's Legion||2}} - Doubles {{KW|Block||2}} gained from a card, then goes to sleep for 2 turns.
* {{R|Sai||2}} - At the start of your turn, gain 7 {{KW|Block||2}}.
* {{R|The Abacus||2}} - Whenever you shuffle your Draw Pile, gain 6 {{KW|Block||2}}.
* {{R|Vitruvian Minion||2}} - Cards containing "Minion" deal double damage and gain double {{KW|Block||2}}.
** See {{QueryLink|Cards|search:Minion|here|2}} for a list of all cards this applies to.
* {{R|Anchor???||2}} - Start each combat with 4 {{KW|Block||2}}.
* {{R|Daughter of the Wind||2}} - Whenever you play an {{QueryLink|Cards|type:Attack|Attack|2}}, gain 1 {{KW|Block||2}}.
* {{R|Fresnel Lens||2}} - Whenever you add a card that gains {{KW|Block||2}} to your Deck, {{KW|Enchant||2}} it with {{KW|Nimble||2}} 2.
* {{R|Orichalcum???||2}} - If you end your turn without {{KW|Block||2}}, gain 3 {{KW|Block||2}}.
